name: All Seasons Indoor Golf Club
about: All Seasons Indoor Golf Club offers five state-of-the-art indoor golf simulator bays equipped with Uneekor technology powered by GSPro. Located in south Kansas City, minutes from Leawood and Overland Park, the facility provides a relaxed, climate-controlled environment for year-round golf. Public play is available with hourly rates starting at $20, alongside monthly membership plans ranging from $185 to $300, which offer discounted access and priority booking. The venue is designed to cater to both serious players seeking to improve their game with advanced analytics and social golfers looking for a casual BYOB-friendly atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-caliber Uneekor simulators with high-speed cameras and precise ball flight analysis
Year-round, weather-proof play in a climate-controlled facility
BYOB-friendly lounge environment perfect for social golf and group events
Structured practice with on-screen data and coaching-ready features
Flexible membership options and hourly public pricing for every type of golfer

food_and_drink.notes: BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) is allowed.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is allowed in the lounge environment.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulators with high-speed cameras and slow-motion swing capture.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether clubs are provided, so players should assume they need to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, All Seasons is a BYOB and BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) facility, creating a relaxed lounge environment for social golfers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not provide a specific time for 18 holes, but as it uses simulator technology, typical playtime would depend on the number of players in the bay and the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to beginners and families, and while it does not specifically market to children, the casual atmosphere and group-friendly design suggest it can accommodate juniors.
